FGO_CARD_ELEMENTARY_MY_DEAR.title: Elementary My Dear
FGO_CARD_ELEMENTARY_MY_DEAR.description: At the start of your turn, remove all Block and lose HP equal to Block to ALL enemies, apply {VulnerablePower:diff()} Vulnerable to ALL enemies if them have Block.
FGO_CARD_GREAT_RAM_NAUTILUS.title: Great Ram Nautilus
FGO_CARD_GREAT_RAM_NAUTILUS.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
 Waterside: damage +50%.
 Waterside: gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}.
FGO_CARD_LIE_LIKE_VORTIGERN.title: Lie Like Vortigern
FGO_CARD_LIE_LIKE_VORTIGERN.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage, lose 2 Strength and apply {IntangiblePower:diff()} Intangible to ALL enemies.
Gain {IntangiblePower:diff()} Intangible.
FGO_CARD_ROADLESS_CAMELOT.title: Roadless Camelot
FGO_CARD_ROADLESS_CAMELOT.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage 3 times to ALL enemies.
Apply {Curse:diff()} Evil_Curse to ALL enemies.
OverCharge.
FGO_CARD_BLACKDOG_GALATINE.title: Blackdog Galatine
FGO_CARD_BLACKDOG_GALATINE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Gain {RegenPower:diff()} Regen.
Gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}{energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}.
FGO_CARD_FETCH_FAILNAUGHT.title: Fetch Failnaught
FGO_CARD_FETCH_FAILNAUGHT.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
 Damage +10% for each Evil_Curse from the enemy.
 Apply 3 Evil_Curse.
 Double the enemy's Evil_Curse.
FGO_CARD_SEVENDRIVE.title: Sevendrive
FGO_CARD_SEVENDRIVE.description:
Gain {Strength:diff()} Strength.
At the end of your turn, lose {Strength:diff()} Strength.
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Gain {Np:diff()}% NP.
FGO_CARD_EXCALIBUR.title: Excalibur
FGO_CARD_EXCALIBUR.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
 Gain {Np:diff()}% NP.
FGO_CARD_ENFER_CHATEAUD_IF.title: Enfer Chateau d'If
FGO_CARD_DESTERRENNACHT.title: De sterrennacht
FGO_CARD_DESTERRENNACHT.description:
Apply 3 Terror ({TerrorChance:diff()}% chance) to ALL enemies.
 Gain {StrengthPower:diff()} Strength and {CritDamage:diff()}% Critical Damage.
 Gain {StarRegen:diff()} Stars each turn.
FGO_CARD_FRAGARACH.title: Fragarach
FGO_CARD_FRAGARACH.description: Whenever you are attacked this turn, deal {Damage:diff()} damage back and you gain 10 Stars.
FGO_CARD_LAST_SUN_XIBALBA.title: Last Sun Xibalba
FGO_CARD_LAST_SUN_XIBALBA.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage 5 times to ALL enemies.
Gain {Star:diff()} Stars.
FGO_CARD_MAHA_PRALAYA.title: Maha Pralaya
FGO_CARD_MAHA_PRALAYA.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL.
Doubled based on the number of enemy debuff types.
FGO_CARD_KUR_KIGAL_IRKALLA.title: Kur Kigal Irkalla
FGO_CARD_KUR_KIGAL_IRKALLA.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies. Enemies without [gold]Flight[/gold] status lose an additional 10% of their max HP.
FGO_CARD_KUR_KIGAL_IRKALLA.extended_desc:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
 Gain 3 Strength.
 Gain 3 Artifact.
FGO_CARD_SECOND_LIFE.title: Anpu Neb Ta Djeser
FGO_CARD_SECOND_LIFE.description: Put a card from your exhaust pile into your hand and Upgrade it.
FGO_CARD_SECOND_LIFE.flavor: This card has no effect when upgraded.
FGO_CARD_YEW_BOW.title: Yew Bow
FGO_CARD_YEW_BOW.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
 If the enemy has Poison, deal {Damage:diff()} damage again.
FGO_CARD_UNLIMITED.title: Unlimited Blade Works
FGO_CARD_UNLIMITED.description: At the start of each turn, add {AttacksPerTurn:diff()} random Attack into your hand. It costs 0 this turn, Exhausted when played.
FGO_CARD_ENUMA_ELISH.title: Enuma Elish
FGO_CARD_SUITEN_NIKKO.title: Yano Shiraishi
FGO_CARD_SUITEN_NIKKO.description:
All cards in your hand cost 1 less this turn.
 Gain {Np:diff()}% NP.
FGO_CARD_SNEFERU_ITERU_NILE.title: Sneferu Iteru Nile
FGO_CARD_SNEFERU_ITERU_NILE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Apply {VulnerablePower:diff()} Vulnerable.
Apply {DeathChance:diff()} DeathChance
Gain Waterside .
FGO_CARD_CODE_ORIGINAL_SIN.title: Code Original Sin
FGO_CARD_CODE_ORIGINAL_SIN.description:
All enemies lose {Damage:diff()} HP.
Gain {Np:diff()} % NP .
FGO_CARD_EXCALIBUR_EXCELSUS.title: Excalibur Excelsus
FGO_CARD_EXCALIBUR_EXCELSUS.description:
Ignores_Invincibility.
For each enemy, gain {Block:diff()} Block, {Strength:diff()} Strength, OverCharge and {Np:diff()}% NP.
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
FGO_CARD_CHARISMA_OF_ADVERSITY.title: Charisma of Adversity
FGO_CARD_CHARISMA_OF_ADVERSITY.descripti:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
per 6 lost hp,
deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
FGO_CARD_NFF_SPECIAL.title: NFF Special
FGO_CARD_NFF_SPECIAL.description:
Draw {Cards:diff()} card.
Add 2 [gold]Poisonous[/gold] [gold]Dagger[/gold] into your discard pile.
FGO_CARD_KALEIDOSCOPE_OPTION.title: Kaleidoscope
FGO_CARD_ANTI_BEAST_MAGECRAFT.title: Anti-beast Magecraft
FGO_CARD_ANTI_BEAST_MAGECRAFT.descriptio: Whenever you gain a Power, gain {AntiBeastMagecraftPower:diff()} Block.
FGO_CARD_IMAGINARY_OCEAN_BATTLE.title: Imaginary Ocean Battle: Fantasy Voyage
FGO_CARD_IMAGINARY_OCEAN_BATTLE.descript:
Gain Imaginary_Space.
Gain Waterside.
Gain {Np:diff()} + current floor NP.
